name: Nyt Original Plum Torte- Burros & Levine
recipeIngredient: 24 halves Italian plums (prune or purple), pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange a rack in the lower third of the oven. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and 3/4 cup sugar until light and fluffy. Add the sifted flour, baking powder, eggs, and salt; beat until well combined.
3. Spoon the batter into an ungreased 9 or 10-inch springform pan. Arrange the plums on top, skin sides down.
4. Mix the cinnamon with the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and sprinkle over the plums.
5. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
6. Refrigerate or freeze if desired.
7. To serve, allow the torte to return to room temperature. If serving warm, reheat at 300°F until warmed through. Serve plain or with vanilla ice cream.
Serves 8.
